title: lithocarpus gaoligongensis
intro: Lithocarpus gaoligongensis, also known as the Gaoligong limestone oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus gaoligongensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by boiling the bark, leaves, or roots to make a medicinal extract.
